title: xblock.aendra.dev / twitter-screenshot / one post
summary: Third-party label; no consumer policy exists for it in the default Bluesky client's pipeline.

provenance.source: labelwatch label_events stream (ATProto firehose via labelwatch ingestion)

consumer.description: Bluesky official appview + client running default moderation pipeline; xblock.aendra.dev NOT subscribed as a labeler service

render_context.policy_pipeline_version_assumed: client running @atproto/api at or near v0.19.17

policy_artifact_searched.search_evidence: Global LABELS map contains entries only for the atproto global label set (!hide, !warn, !no-unauthenticated, !takedown, porn, sexual, nudity, graphic-media, intolerant, self-harm, sensitive, threat, spam, rude, sexual-figurative, impersonation, illicit, security, misleading, unsafe-link, inauthentic). No entry for 'twitter-screenshot'.

PolicyDocumentation.execution_surface_source: no documented policy for this label_value in the named consumer's pipeline; execution_surface is undefined for an absent policy
PolicyDocumentation.scoping_note: This is the policy-documentation status FOR THE NAMED CONSUMER under the stated render_context. The evidence is silent over other consumer configurations (e.g., a viewer who has explicitly subscribed to xblock as a labeler service). A separate specimen (002b) would be required to characterize the opt-in case.

LabelerEmitterDocumentation.scoping_note: xblock.aendra.dev publishes an app.bsky.labeler.service record that declares labelValueDefinitions for twitter-screenshot. consumer_scope='emitter_declared' means the LABELER has declared a rule; it does NOT mean the bsky.app-default-client consumer honors it. Default consumer does not subscribe to xblock unless the viewer opts in. F-004 records this distinction.

extracted_definition.note: Fixture-side citation. Detection-lane packets pull the full definition body from labelwatch's discovery_events. Both paths yield artifact_kind=service_record / consumer_scope=emitter_declared.

PolicyWitness.reason: No policy is documented for this label_value in this consumer's pipeline; there is no rule whose live application could be witnessed.

RenderObservation.reason: Same architectural absence as 001: ATProto publishes no per-render receipts. Additionally for 002, no render action is expected under the named consumer's documented policy, so the absence is both architectural and consequential.
what_would_be_required_for_observation: consumer-side per-render receipts in a published stream (does not currently exist in atproto)

HostingObservation.reason: No documented policy for this label_value in the named consumer's pipeline; hosting observation is not framed for an absent policy.

StateBasis.derivation_source: hand-authored fixture; xblock service-record citation last reviewed 2026-06-08
StateBasis.note: Bundle E: fixture-author basis. freshness_horizon='unknown' because the cited service record may have been re-published since authorship. Exporter freshness lane classifies as unknown_basis.
